description: Run an Exa web search (search_and_contents) and write ranked results to JSON
rules: read-only (queries the Exa API; mutates nothing remote)
requires the exa-py SDK, an EXA_API_KEY, and internet access
sets the x-exa-integration tracking header — do not remove
results written to record_store as search.json
usage: Set QUERY (and EXA_API_KEY). Optional: SEARCH_TYPE (auto|fast|deep), NUM_RESULTS, CATEGORY (e.g. 'research paper'), INCLUDE_DOMAINS / EXCLUDE_DOMAINS (comma-separated). Output: search.json.
limitation: Read-only retrieval only. Needs network + a valid EXA_API_KEY; degrades to an empty {} report when the SDK or key is absent.
